name: USP消音版 | 宝蓝之色
descriptionEn: A fan favorite from Counter-Strike Source, the Silenced USP Pistol has a detachable silencer that gives shots less recoil while suppressing attention-getting noise. It has been painted solid colors in indigo, crimson and grey. You should smile Felix, you'd have more luck with the ladies if you didn't look like such a dour bastard all the time - Imogen, Arms Dealer In Training
descriptionZh: 从《反恐精英：起源》中穿越而来，是玩家们的最爱，消音版 USP 手枪装有一个可拆卸的消音器，降低后坐力的同时还能抑制住容易引起注意的枪声。 这把武器使用紫青色、深红色和灰色进行了整体喷漆。 费利克斯，你应该保持微笑，如果你不像现在这样总是摆一副苦逼脸的话肯定会有桃花运。- 实习军火商伊莫金
